html:
The Blue Gem is an item used to craft several Magical Items. It can be used to craft the Ice Staff, Chilled Amulet, and Purple Gem.

Blue Gems can be used to turn Chester into Snow Chester by placing at least one in each of his inventory slots on a Full Moon, granting him slower food spoilage like a mobile Ice Box.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Blue Gems have a 0.04% chance to be dropped by Tumbleweeds.

In Shipwrecked, fishing with a Trawl Net in deep Ocean has a small chance to catch a Blue Gem. The chance is higher during Hurricane Season and Dry Season. Magma Piles found in Magma Fields also have a chance to drop Blue Gems when dug.

In the Hamlet DLC, Blue Gems can be obtained by Hammering A Smashing Pot, trawling in the Lily Ponds, Petrified Eggs and atop pedestals in Ancient Pig Ruins. They also drop from Queen Womant's Throne and the Pugalisk

Trivia

  • Blue Gems were introduced in the A Winter's Tale update.
  • Blue Gems used to have the same shape as Red Gems.
  • The old Blue Gem appearance can be seen on the Ultimate Survival Inventory poster sold on Klei's official merch store.

Gallery

  • Medal blue emoji from official Klei Discord server.
  • The new high-resolution texture.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

–Wilson
“Ugh. This one is ugly.”
–Willow

“A magic blue gem!”
–Walter
“Why do people say things are as blue as the sea? The sea isn't very blue at all!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ngọc Xanh là một vật phẩm dùng để chế tạo một số Vật phẩm Ma thuật. Nó có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Gậy Băng, Bùa Lạnh và Ngọc Tím.

The sea isn't very blue at all! |choose = wilson}} The '''Blue Gem''' is an item used to craft several [[Magic]]al Items. It can be used to craft the [[Ice Staff]], [[Chilled Amulet]], and [[Purple Gem]]. Blue Gems can be used to turn [[Chester]] into [[Snow Chester]] by placing at least one in each of his inventory slots on a [[Full Moon]], granting him slower food spoilage like a mobile [[Ice Box]]. __NOTOC__ =={{Pic|32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content== In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, Blue Gems have a 0.04% chance to be dropped by [[Tumbleweed]]s. In ''[[Shipwrecked]]'', fishing with a [[Trawl Net]] in deep [[Ocean]] has a small chance to catch a Blue Gem. The chance is higher during [[Hurricane Season]] and [[Dry Season]]. [[Magma Pile]]s found in [[Magma Field]]s also have a chance to drop Blue Gems when dug. In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, Blue Gems can be obtained by [[Hammer]]ing [[A Smashing Pot]], [[Trawl Net|trawling]] in the [[Lily Pond|Lily Ponds]], [[Petrified Egg|Petrified Eggs]] and atop pedestals in [[Ancient Pig Ruins]]. They also drop from [[Queen Womant|Queen Womant's]] [[Stalacmite Throne|Throne]] and the [[Pugalisk]] =={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Blue Gem |item2 = Red Gem |tool = Prestihatitator |result = Purple Gem}} {{Recipe |item1 = Blue Gem |item2 = Spear |tool = Prestihatitator |result = Ice Staff}} {{Recipe |item1 = Blue Gem |item2 = Gold Nugget |tool = Prestihatitator |result = Chilled Amulet|item3=Gold Nugget|item4=Gold Nugget}} {{Recipe |item1 = Blue Gem |tool = Pig Banker |result = Tenpiece Oinc |dlc = Hamlet}} {{Recipe |item1 = Blue Gem |item2 = Twigs |item3 = Iron Ore |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Magnifying Glass |dlc = Hamlet}} {{Recipe |item1 = Blue Gem |item2 = Alloy |count2 = 2 |item3 = Ice |count3 = 6 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Sprinkler |dlc = Hamlet}} == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Blue Gems were introduced in the ''A Winter's Tale'' update. * Blue Gems used to have the same shape as Red Gems. * The old Blue Gem appearance can be seen on the Ultimate Survival Inventory poster sold on Klei's official merch store. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Blue Gem emoji from official Klei Discord server.png|Medal blue emoji from official Klei Discord server.
